lines: The Indiana Fever, riding a 10-8 record, host the Los Angeles Sparks tonight at 8:00 PM ET.
The Indianapolis Indians were beaten 8‑3 by the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders yesterday.
The Indianapolis Indians welcome the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders at home tonight, with a 7:05 PM ET start.
escape_hatch: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.

speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Saturday, June 27. The Indiana Fever, riding a 10 to 8 record, host the Los Angeles Sparks tonight at 8:00 PM ET. The Indianapolis Indians were beaten 8‑3 by the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders yesterday. The Indianapolis Indians welcome the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders at home tonight, with a 7:05 PM ET start. And if it gets away from you, your out is: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.
